texto: I have seen young boys in this village get married. They think it all bed, poor fellows. I see it quite different to this. I’m in no hurry at all. I must work. I mustn’t be worried or distracted. Not yet. I couldn’t spend time on my work if I was married.
autor: Akenfield: Portrait of an English Village
explicacao: Orientação direta de Akenfield: Portrait of an English Village sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “I have seen young boys in this village get married. They think it all bed, poor fellows. I see it…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, love, marriage, útil em momentos de casamento e termino.
